calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-08-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-21-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Or Tax Costs
Off Calendar Jan-14-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Volkswagen Group of America, Inc.'s unopposed Motion To Strike Or Tax Costs is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing and no opposition having been filed, the court orders Plaintiff's costs taxed in the amount of $5,058.55.

Prior to the time set for hearing, Moving Party shall lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org a proposed order containing the above text verbatim.

No proposed order received. Plaintiff failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2025 Set For Trial On Jun-01-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
